subcodes.title: Words to Shaykh Salman, spoken on 1915-04-12
subcodes.first_line: Why do they feel compelled to spread false rumors?... It is said that Nadir Shah once advanced a claim to Baghdad... His Holiness (Imam ‘Alí) was surrounded by enemies and wished to take refuge elsewhere. He said to one of His companions (Salman, the Persian), “Place me in this basket
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه لزوم کرده اخبار دروغ انتشار بدهند اگر خبری ندارند اصلا ننویسند حالا که دروغ میگویند
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @stories; anecdotes, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
